title: erysimum calycinum
intro: Erysimum calycinum, also known as wallflower, is a flowering plant species in the genus Erysimum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erysimum calycinum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Erysimum calycinum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
